name: Ramsey Credit Services
description_short: Atlanta-based credit repair service offering dispute resolution and debt consolidation to help consumers improve credit scores and creditworthiness.
description_long:
Ramsey Credit Services operates from a professional office location at 3340 Peachtree Rd NE in Atlanta, Georgia, serving consumers seeking to repair damaged credit profiles. The company is led by an owner (referenced as Brandon in reviews) who provides direct consultation on credit repair strategies.

The company's primary services include credit repair through dispute processes and debt consolidation assistance. They work with clients to identify and challenge inaccurate or negative items on credit reports, with documented cases showing score improvements within 30 days according to customer testimonials. The business maintains standard business hours Monday through Friday, 10 AM to 5 PM, and accepts phone inquiries at (877) 515-0955.

Ramsey Credit Services distinguishes itself through personalized owner involvement and ongoing customer support. Positive reviews highlight the owner's responsiveness, detailed guidance throughout the dispute process, and willingness to provide extended assistance without additional charges when disputes extend beyond initial timelines. One reviewer noted the assistant's hands-on support for less tech-savvy clients, suggesting a focus on accessibility.

However, the company shows significant operational inconsistencies. Multiple low-star reviews document failures in communication (two-month email silence with continued billing), unresponsiveness to cancellation requests, and difficulty reaching the business through listed contact methods. One negative review mentions the owner removed accounts from reports but disputes lingered due to newly-reported accounts during the process. The 3.8-star aggregate rating across 20 reviews reflects this mixed performance pattern, indicating potential reliability concerns despite positive outcomes for some clients.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Documented credit score improvements within 30 days for some clients
Owner provides direct consultation and involvement in credit cases
Offers personalized assistance for clients with low computer literacy
Continues working on cases without additional charges when disputes extend
Successfully disputes and removes various accounts from credit reports
Pre-qualification for home purchase achieved by at least one client after service
Staff makes multiple follow-up contacts to guide clients through process
cons: Poor email communication with documented two-month silence while still charging clients
Unresponsive to cancellation requests despite customer demands to stop billing
Disputes can be complicated by newly-reported accounts during ongoing disputes, extending timelines
Mixed customer satisfaction with 3.8-star aggregate rating showing operational inconsistency
Owner defensive in response to negative reviews rather than consistently professional acknowledgment
best_for: Atlanta-area consumers with multiple negative accounts seeking owner-involved credit repair
Clients preferring in-person consultation and hands-on guidance through dispute process
Individuals willing to work directly with business owner for personalized credit strategy
diagnosis: Ramsey Credit Services is best for Atlanta-based consumers seeking direct owner involvement in credit repair with documented ability to achieve score improvements within 30 days. However, prospective clients should be aware of communication reliability concerns and billing issues documented in recent reviews—requests for service cancellation and responses to inquiries appear inconsistently handled.
services: Customer support for dispute process navigation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
